audience_policies.source_phrase: Each pass admits 4 people (including at least one MA resident) at 50% off at all admission levels. This pass can be used for access to the Harvard Natural History Museum and the Peabody Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology.

coupon.source_phrase_block: Each pass admits 4 people (including at least one MA resident) at 50% off at all admission levels. This pass can be used for access to the Harvard Natural History Museum and the Peabody Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology.
